name: Vanilla Walnut Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups bread flour (adjust to your machine's requirements)
2 whole eggs (separate into yolks and whites as needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Adjust the amount of bread flour for your mixing machine, between 1 1/2 and 2 cups.
2. Scald the milk, then stir in the honey and butter until combined. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
3. Add the cooled milk mixture and all remaining ingredients (except brown sugar and walnuts) to the mixer, following the order suggested by your machine's instructions.
4. At the beeper or end of the first kneading cycle, add the brown sugar and chopped walnuts.
5. Serve warm or at room temperature.
